title: Peek-a-Boo, Esme!
synopsis: Baby Esme plays peek-a-boo with her loving family members throughout the house, discovering each person hiding behind colorful objects with joyful surprise and giggles.

illustration.description: Baby Esme with curly black hair and warm brown skin sits on a soft cream carpet, reaching toward a bright yellow curtain. Her mama, a woman with shoulder-length black hair and kind brown eyes, peeks out from behind the curtain with a big smile. The room has pastel walls and gentle morning light streaming through windows.
illustration.alt: Baby Esme reaching toward yellow curtain where Mama is hiding

illustration.description: Mama emerges fully from behind the curtain with arms outstretched, wearing a soft lavender sweater. Baby Esme claps her chubby hands with pure delight, mouth open in laughter. Warm golden light fills the cozy living room with a plush sofa and colorful throw pillows in the background.
illustration.alt: Mama playing peek-a-boo with giggling baby Esme

illustration.description: Esme crawls toward the kitchen where a large turquoise mixing bowl sits on the counter. Papa, a tall man with gentle features and short black hair, crouches behind the counter with twinkling eyes visible over the bowl's rim. The kitchen has warm wooden cabinets and soft mint green walls.
illustration.alt: Papa hiding behind mixing bowl in kitchen while Esme approaches

illustration.description: Papa pops up from behind the counter holding the mixing bowl, his face beaming with joy. Esme sits on the kitchen floor clapping enthusiastically, her eyes sparkling with happiness. Sunlight streams through a window, casting warm shadows on the wooden floor and highlighting floating dust motes.
illustration.alt: Papa surprising Esme from behind mixing bowl while she claps

illustration.description: In a cozy bedroom, Esme pulls herself up against a bed covered with a coral pink quilt. Nana, an older woman with silver-streaked hair and warm brown skin, hides behind the quilt with only her loving eyes and smile visible. The room has soft peach walls and family photos on the nightstand.
illustration.alt: Nana hiding behind coral pink quilt while Esme stands at bedside

illustration.description: Nana sits on the bed holding the quilt aside, wearing a soft cardigan and reaching toward Esme with gentle hands. Baby Esme bounces excitedly on her toes, holding the bed edge for support, her face glowing with pure joy. The afternoon light creates a dreamy, warm atmosphere in the bedroom.
illustration.alt: Nana on bed reaching for bouncing baby Esme

illustration.description: Four-year-old Maya, Esme's big sister with pigtails and the same warm brown skin, hides behind a large rainbow-colored picture book in the nursery. Esme sits among scattered soft toys on a fluffy rug, looking curiously at the book. The nursery has pale yellow walls and a mobile with gentle animals hanging above.
illustration.alt: Big sister Maya hiding behind colorful picture book in nursery

illustration.description: Maya drops the picture book and opens her arms wide with a delighted grin. Baby Esme reaches up toward her big sister, both girls radiating pure happiness. The nursery glows with warm afternoon light, and stuffed animals seem to smile from their spots around the room, creating a magical, loving atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Big sister Maya and baby Esme hugging in sunny nursery

illustration.description: All family members gather around baby Esme in the living room - Mama, Papa, Nana, and Maya all smiling down at her with pure love. Esme sits in the center, arms raised high with joy, surrounded by the colorful objects used in their peek-a-boo games. Golden evening light bathes the scene in warmth and togetherness.
illustration.alt: Whole family surrounding happy baby Esme in loving group scene

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: Who hides behind the yellow curtain?
questions.explanation: Mama hides behind the yellow curtain and says 'boo!' to make Esme giggle.

questions.question: What does Papa hide behind?
questions.explanation: Papa hides behind a turquoise mixing bowl in the kitchen.

questions.question: What does Esme do when everyone says 'boo'?
questions.explanation: Esme giggles, claps, bounces, and hugs because she loves playing peek-a-boo!
